entry.title: Links to SAP demo recordings for HCM Business AI features
entry.content:
Introduction

Sharing this reference table I created as part of our SAP AI Adoption Team - North America. 

  • All recordings are hosted on SAP sites or official SAP channels on third party sites.
  • This list is not exhaustive (many Joule use cases are missing but the Gen AI list is close to being exhaustive) and was last updated on June 9th, 2025.
  • It will be updated on an ongoing basis and after every release.
  • The list is inspired by the Business AI for HR - Set up Guide public presentation on the SAP Digital Library.
  • To put these AI features in the context of the SAP SuccessFactors suite of cloud HR solutions I highly recommend the Interactive Value Journey which in some cases also has recordings.
  • For Business Value insights for each of these AI features I would recommend the Discovery Center (see Business Value 3 pager on each feature page) as well as the "Maximizing the value of AI for the business" public presentation.

 

 

ModuleAI FeatureDescription
All ModulesAI-assisted Writing

Enhance any text with the following options: change tone, make longer/shorter, make bulleted list, flag inappropriate verbiage and suggest alternative, translate into any language.

Link 1 (Continuous Performance Management / End User demo)

Link 2  (Text Analyzer and Translation / End User Demo)

Link 3 (Recruiting / Admin Demo)

 

Performance ManagementGenerate Comments and Improve My Feedback

AI uses a specific competency or skill and its rating as input to suggests new comments (without any user input) or proposes enhancements to existing text (PM, 360).

Link 1 (Generate Comments)

Link 2 (Improve My Feedback)

 

Performance ManagementMake Feedback Actionable in Continuous Performance Management

Suggests text improvement to make feedback more actionable for a team member.

Link

Performance ManagementAI-assisted Goal Creation

Allows users to create individual, development or team goals using generative AI capabilities.

Link 1

Link 2

Performance ManagementAI-assisted Goal Creation on Mobile

Easily set and customize detailed goals in seconds on Mobile making the process quick, personalized, and effective.

Link

Performance ManagementAI-assisted Performance Insights

Allows Managers to see a summary of an employee’s performance review.

Link

Performance ManagementAI-assisted 360 reports Insights

Users can gain synthesized insights from participant feedback, both overall and for individual skills or competencies.

Link

Performance ManagementSentiment Analysis for Detailed 360 Reports

Allows users to gain insight into the sentiment of rater’s feedback in 360 reviews. 

Link

Succession ManagementAI-assisted Career Insights

Employees can gain insights into development actions they can take towards their target role.

Link

Succession ManagementAI-assisted Successor Insights

Allows users to generate insights into successors nominated for an incumbent.

Link

RecruitingAI-assisted Skills Validation for Applicants

Allows applicants to add and manage skills that they want to share with the recruiter, as part of their application. 

Link 1

Link 2 ("AI Assisted Applicant Screening" at 2'56)

RecruitingAI-assisted Skills Matching for Applicants

Allow applicants to upload their resume and instantly see available jobs that match their skills.

Link 1

Link 2 ("AI Assisted Applicant Screening" at 2'20)

Link 3

RecruitingAI-assisted Skills Validation from Job Requisition

Allows recruiters to quickly extract and classify skills from a job requisition.

Link 1

Link 2 ("AI Assisted Applicant Screening" at 1'35)

RecruitingAI-assisted Skills Matching for Assisted Applicant Screening 

Provides recruiters with visibility into the applicant's skills and how they match the skills required for the job.

Link 1

Link 2 ("AI Assisted Applicant Screening" at 3'21)

RecruitingAI-assisted Job Description creation

Recruiters can use generative AI to create job descriptions from scratch when they create job requisitions.

Link ("Job Descriptions with AI" at 1'20)

RecruitingAI-assisted Interview Questions

Generate interview questions based on the job description using generative AI and evaluate applicants in Microsoft Teams after they complete their interviews.

Link 1 ("Interview Questions with AI and Interview Evaluations in Microsoft Teams" at 0'48)

Link 2

RecruitingAI-assisted Interview Feedback

Generate comprehensive insights from the candidate's interview feedback using generative AI capabilities.

Link 1

Link 2 ("Interview Questions with AI and Interview Evaluations in Microsoft Teams" at 2'13)

Talent Intelligence HubAI-assisted Skills Architecture Creation

Create an AI-based skills library by extracting skills from job profiles in Job Profile Builder.

Link

Talent Intelligence HubAI-assisted Skills Standardization

Use the AI-assisted capabilities to standardize skill names in the Attributes Library.

Link

LearningAI-assisted Image Generation in Learning

Allows users to create images in Learning Items, Curricula and more.

Link

LearningAssociate Skills with Learning Items Through Import

Allows Learning admins to associate learning items with skills in bulk.

Link

LearningAI to Associate Skills With Open Content Network Items

Use AI to associate skills with Open Content Network (OCN) items based on the predefined skills provided by the OCN providers.

Link

Employee CentralAI-assisted Person Insights 

Generate Insights from an Employee’s Compensation and Job History to support informed compensation discussions.

Link

PlatformAI-translated Locales

Allows users to create language packs.

Link

PlatformAI-assisted Microsoft Teams App Chat

Allows users to interact with the SAP SuccessFactors app in Microsoft Teams.

Link

Opportunity MarketplaceCreate Assignments using AI

Assignment owners only need to enter assignment objectives and an assignment is generated based on the input using generative AI capabilities.

Link

JouleView my Pay Statement

Users can ask Joule for a link to any of their recent pay statements.

Link

JouleExplain my Pay

Ask detailed questions about a pay statement to Joule.

Link 1

Link 2

JouleDocument Grounding

Allows search in company documents through Joule.

Link 1

Link 2

Link 3

JouleCreate a Position using AI

Administrators can create a position through Q&A with Joule.

Link

Joule Approve Spot Awards Request

Approvers can use Joule to approve spot awards requests.

Link

JouleSkill Search

Search for colleagues with specific skills.

Link

JoulePlanning an onsite meeting 

Be more efficient by creating actions for Microsoft Outlook, Microsoft Teams or SAP Ariba directly in Joule.

Link 1

Link 2

JouleCreate Time Off request

Request some Time off.

Link

 

All the best, 
Xavier

 

(if you found this post useful please consider giving it a like)

entry.title: Re: Option to remove To Do Cards under For You Today for Calibration Executive Reviewers
entry.content: Could you share the process?

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content: @AnkitaDua : yes ,you can  develop your own CPI and retrieve any info and show in alerts

entry.title: Re: Working with Determination in the Service Cloud V2 Using Code Blocks
entry.content: @EwoudeW  : email to case scenario had this functionality

entry.title: Re: Payroll Rounding difference amount '0.01'
entry.content:
Hi! This kind of rounding discrepancy (0.01 difference) often occurs due to proportional calculations when wage types are split across partial periods—especially in mid-month payroll runs. One effective approach is to use constant rounding rules or custom PCRs to round specific wage types to the nearest full value during schema processing. You may also want to check the configuration for cumulation classes and rounding settings in your payroll schema (e.g., XVAL, XR00) and adjust them accordingly.

For a more detailed breakdown or custom guidance on SAP HCM Payroll tuning, feel free to refer to:
erproots.com – No-follow link, just sharing for additional resources.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Can the billing block be removed from the billing pla...
entry.content:
Hello Noni,

Yes. There is standard feature to skip approval workflow based on custom logic. Please find detail in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/4ed56484764b4756b0e460922f0b4535.html 

Best regards,

Yong

entry.title: Re: Item groups running with different valuation method S...
entry.content:
Hi Nikunj,

SAP applies the valuation method based on item group unless overridden at the item level. FIFO offers more accurate cost tracking, while Moving Average is simpler but less precise. Switching from Moving Average to FIFO is possible, but it requires clearing and re-adding inventory—so proceed carefully.

You can explore more SAP inventory best practices here (no-follow) : https://www.erproots.com

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Dynamically highlighted totals & Subtotals in SAC Table widget using Styling rules
entry.content:
Hi @jozsef_zerczi ,

I'm glad that you found my blog helpful. 
Could you share screenshots of your current table and your expected result in a different screenshot? I will certainly check and figure out if we could achieve the requirement.

With regards,
Siva Prakash.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Group Management in SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
@Rolu While AEM is not available for free trial, but you can still get a free Solace trail(backbone of SAP AEM) for 30 days. It has exactly the same look & feel and features.

https://solace.com/try-it-now/

entry.title: Re: How to Migrate Stock from IM Managed to EWM Managed S...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try by setting "Do not post data in ERP" checkbox in Initial stock upload ( /scwm/isu ) or equivalent transaction.

entry.title: Re: Can the billing block be removed from the billing pla...
entry.content:
Hi Noni,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, making changes to key fields like billing blocks in a sales order—even after prior approval—can retrigger the approval workflow. This is by design, as SAP treats certain modifications as significant enough to require revalidation.

To avoid unnecessary re-approvals, consider whether the billing block can be managed outside the approval-relevant fields or consult your workflow configuration in the Manage Sales Document Workflows app.

You can explore SAP S/4HANA sales order workflow best practices here (no-follow): https://www.erproots.com

Hope this helps!
—Team ERPROOTS

entry.title: Re: Why are the customer invoices not listed in the Open...
entry.content:
Customer invoices don’t appear under G/L Open Item Management because they’re managed in the customer sub-ledger. Check the customer account instead, or ensure the G/L account is set to “Open Item Managed” and correctly linked.

More insights here (no-follow): https://www.erproots.com

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Can employees of a SAP Partner purchase SAP Learning...
entry.content:
Hello, 

as an employee of a SAP Partner company everyone can purchase themselves SAP LH professional subscription. The partner edition comes with the corporate email address. Generally it is valid for every employee but it doesn't have certification attempts and can't be used to renew certification according to the SAP Stay Certified policy.  For this you need professional edition. 

SAP Learning Hub | Your Online E-Learning Enablement Platform - go to pricing and click Buy now. When you login the corporate discount will apply automatically. Everyone can do this themselves. 

Hope it is helpful. 😊

entry.title: QE51N - Formulated Characteristic Not Recalculated When Optional Input is Cleared After Rejection
entry.content:
Normally, for characteristics that are defined as not required in the control plan, we proceed by leaving the result field blank. As a result, these optional characteristics appear as “NA” or “Not Applicable” on the certificate of analysis, which is the intended behavior.

The issue:
Even after clearing the values for the optional characteristics, the calculated characteristic retains its old value instead of being recalculated or left blank accordingly. When I attempt to force recalculation or leave it empty, the system throws an error. From a business perspective, if the input characteristics are left blank (since they are optional), the calculated result should also be blank, not hold a previous calculated value.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or found a way to force recalculation or reset the formula-based characteristic when optional inputs are cleared after rejection?

entry.title: Step-by-Step Guide to Setting Up Custom Fields in Work Center Formula Parameters
entry.content:
Hello All,

Welcome to my blog!!

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, customizing fields and formulas in manufacturing processes can greatly enhance flexibility and precision. This blog post walks you through the steps to create and map custom fields to Work Center Formula Parameters, enabling you to define custom calculations tailored to your business requirements. Whether you’re configuring manufacturing master data or refining routing operations, this guide provides a clear, step-by-step approach to ensure a smooth setup.

  • Access Fiori app ‘Custom Fields’ > Click ‘+’ icon to create a custom field. In the New Field popup, set the Business Context to ‘Manufacturing: Bill of Operations Operation (PP_BILLOFOPERATIONS_OPERATION) and the field type to ‘Quantity with Unit’ as no other Business context or field types are supported for WorkCentre formula parameters. Once required data entered, click Create and Edit.

  • On the Custom Field screen, under the General Information tab, take note of the Field Component Name ending with the suffix ‘_PPO’, as this will be used to map the custom field to a parameter.

  • On the User Interfaces tab, enable the custom field’s usage for the relevant SAP GUI screens, CDS Views, and Services.

  • Enable the custom field’s usage for the relevant APIs.

  • Enable the custom field’s usage for the relevant Business Scenario. Enable Routing to Production order on Operation level for Discrete Manufacturing, Master Recipe to Process Order on Operation Level for Process Manufacturing and Shop Floor Routing to Production Order on Operation Level for Complex Manufacturing scenarios.

  • Enable the custom field’s usage for the required SOAP APIs

  • After entering all the necessary information, Save and Publish the custom field. Once saved, you’ll notice two entries: one for the Bill of Operations Operation business context and another for the Order Operation business context, where the custom field will be visible.

  • Once the custom field is published, you can view the newly created field at Routing Operation level under Custom Fields section.

  • Navigate to Configuration path Manufacturing and Quality > Manufacturing Master Data > Common Settings for Work Center and Resource > Define Parameters

  • Create the Work Center Formula Parameter with origin 8 (Custom Field from Operation). Fill in all the necessary data, leaving the ‘Field Name’ field blank.

  • Once the parameter is defined, map the newly created custom field to Workcenter formula parameter via Manufacturing and Quality > Manufacturing Master Data > Routings > Routing > Mapping custom Tasklist operation Fields to Work Center Formula Parameters.

  • Create New Entries by adding the parameter name that is created in Step (10) and the Field component name recorded in step (2)

  • Once mapping completed, navigate to the configuration path Manufacturing and Quality > Manufacturing Master Data > Work Centers > Work Center > Define Formulas for Work Centers

  • Define the formula according to business requirements, using the parameter mapped to the custom field.

By following these steps, you can effectively configure custom fields and map them to Work Center Formula Parameters in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This allows for greater customization and precision in your manufacturing operations, enabling you to define formulas that align perfectly with your business needs. With the right setup, you can unlock the full potential of SAP’s flexible manufacturing framework and enhance your operational efficiency.

Hope you find it informative and Happy Learning!!

entry.title: Re: Business One client does not show menu
entry.content:
Hi @frodohtx The issue seems UI-related—likely due to theme or display settings.

✅ Try changing the SAP B1 theme (Tools > General Settings > Display),
✅ Update graphics drivers,
✅ Reset the cockpit,
✅ Or adjust Windows display scaling.

Still stuck? Explore fixes via erproots.com (nofollow).

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Do we have any standard APIs available in SAP PI (NWDS) to retrieve message logs
entry.content:
Hi All, I'm working on automating some monitoring/reporting tasks and was wondering if SAP PI (NWDS) provides any standard APIs to programmatically access message logs and retrieve a list of communication channels.

 

By using this below API I'm unable to retriew the Messages logs

https://<host>:<port>/mdt/messageoverviewqueryservlet?component=<component_name>&view=<view_type>&begin=<begin_datetime>&end=<end_datetime>&detailedStatus=true

entry.title: Re: I have a question where there is a parameter in one o...
entry.content:
Hello Kritisharma,

You can check in the Argument Value section from Job level to see what the values are being passed to the parameters defined at the workflow level.

Hope this answers your question.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How can we update orders via REST api?
entry.content: Hey Manoel, to bad since updating from S/4 is possible. I'll add a request on the influence portal. thanks.

entry.title: Re: Integration flows do not work in the Integration Suite Trial version.
entry.content: I am currently using the SAP Integration Suite Trial version, and I am facing the issues, unable to create new integration flows in the Design workspace. Imported integration flows are not editable. unable to deploy any integration flows—deployment options are either disabled or result in errors. It appears that all iFlow-related functionalities are restricted or unavailable in my trial environment. Could you please confirm if these are known limitations of the trial version, or if there is any specific configuration or entitlement I am missing?

entry.title: Re: How can you work with in-process inspections in SAP D...
entry.content: thanks Michael, in your answer I read I need to use the data collections to do quality checklists. I will give that option a try.

entry.title: Re: report painter: add a column related to balance carry...
entry.content:
Hi!
To show the carry forward balance in Report Painter, try using Amount Type = 100 (which represents carry forward values). Add it under the Key Figures section, and ensure your characteristics (like version, fiscal year, and fund center) are correctly set.

If you're still facing issues, feel free to check more SAP report configuration tips at erproots.com (nofollow).

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello everyone! I'm from Indonesia.

Just entered the world of SAP 7 months ago and I'm currently working as an SAP Technical Consultant. Nice to meet you all!

entry.title: Re: Integration flows do not work in the Integration Suite Trial version.
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue. I even deleted the Integration Suite and recreated a BTP trial account, but the problem persists. The flows are neither being created nor are the imported flows opening or working. This has been happening for the past 2–3 days.

entry.title: Re: How to set-up file paths while using ABAP Dataflow in...
entry.content:
Hello Yuvraj,

It is recommended to use RFC Streaming to fetch data even with ABAP Data Flow. You can check the details in the below link: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/df959412681b4619a38f03ff90207e6b/5777d5546d6d1014b3fc9283b0e91070.html

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: I have a question where there is a parameter in one o...
entry.content: You mean right click on the job and then properties and then global variables? I dont see that parameter there. I only see it when i go inside that specific workflow.

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Auto-Approval for Leaves of Three Days...
entry.content:
Hi @Gurdeep 

Use case 1:- Workflow based on Employee Level

                                Business rule has to be created for the various employee level with relevant workflow for different Time Types wherever the workflow is required. In this case the business rule for workflow has to be mapped in Employee time object instead of Time Type. While creating business, workflow condition has to be defined for approval/cancellation status. 

Use case 2:- auto-approving leave requests

                               This is possible at workflow level. When Workflow is created in "Manage Organization, Pay and Job Structures" define the number of days at "Days until Auto Approval". If no action is taken by the approver, system will execute the auto approval. "Days until Auto Approval" can be set up can be customized at various "Approver Type" as well. Auto approval feature will work based on the data centre/server time zone. Auto approval time cannot be customized based on the country wise.

 

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: SAP
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Public Edition, you can change the country postal code setting using SSCUI 101403 – Define Country-Specific Checks.

Steps:

  1. Open the "Manage Your Solution" app.

  2. Search for SSCUI 101403.

  3. Choose the relevant country.

  4. Adjust the postal code format or rules.

  5. Save the changes.

For more SAP setup tips, you can refer to our site (no-follow): www.erproots.com.

entry.title: Group Reporting: Why are the elimination journals reversed automatically?
entry.content:
Hi, I observed that the elimination journals posted by the reclassification tasks of Consolidation Monitor are reversed automatically (with a posting date of the next period).

However, I am unable to figure out WHY the reversal is needed? Why can’t we leave those elimination journals un-reversed?

entry.title: Re: Two OPEN SQl statements with same WHERE condition, di...
entry.content: If it worked, please provide the solution in a comment and then also accept my answer as solution. Thanks!

entry.title: when i was trying to generate fiori app through project from template in BAS in trial account
entry.content:
An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Edmx (metadata) is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.

{"message":"@sap/fiori:app generator failed - env.on(error) An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Error: An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Edmx (metadata) is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.","stack":"Error: env.on(error) An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Error: An error has occurred, please restart the generator : Edmx (metadata) is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.\n\tat FioriAppGenerator._exitOnError (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/generator-fiori/generators/fiori-app-sub-generator/index.js:1:16010)\n\tat FioriAppGenerator.prompting (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/generator-fiori/generators/fiori-app-sub-generator/index.js:1:12626)"}

tried npm uninstall -g @SAP/generator-fiori,npm install -g @SAP/generator-fiori

entry.title: Re: Licence for SAP New Group Reporting
entry.content:
Hi Ajay,

Your understanding is generally correct:

  • For Cloud: The GR (Governance, Risk) solution licensing is usually bundled and based on user subscription. You don’t separately license the GR server.

  • For On-Premise: You typically need to license both the GR server and the required user licenses separately.

To get a high-level view of GR licensing, it's best to:

  • Refer to SAP's official price list (PAM) or Product Availability Matrix.

  • Contact your SAP account manager for tailored insights based on your landscape.

For more clarification on SAP licensing and deployment models, you can explore resources on www.erproots.com (no-follow).

entry.title: Re: Use Change Audit Reports
entry.content:
Hello Paidi,

Please consider that Change audit is not real time, meaning changes are pushed to the Audit Log service in an asynchronous way and it could take up to 8 hours. Did you take this into consideration before running your tests ?

Regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Licence for SAP New Group Reporting
entry.content: Thanks for the added clarity, Arleigh. That helps solidify the block-based licensing model—25 entities per block tied to consolidation units in Group Reporting makes it easier to scale based on business needs. For those looking into SAP Group Reporting license structures or deployment options, feel free to explore more insights via erproots.com (nofollow).

entry.title: Re: How to index variant attributes to find them from search
entry.content:
Similar for mkysoft's suggestion, you need to create your own value provider and index the ISO data to product.
Please check the similar discussion and solution part for details:

https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-q-a/solr-index-search-for-variant-products/qaq-p/12028948

Best regards,

Kevin

entry.title: Re: Wrong SAP user associated to spool request SP01
entry.content:
Hello,

Late on this.

I used, JOP OPEN....SUBMIT <program> USER <user> JOB CLOSE and EXPORT TO SHARED MEMORY to send complex data to the job.

With this, everything was done with the relevant user.

entry.title: Re: EPIC集成银行CBS系统的落地方案
entry.content:
Hello @杨欣 ,

针对EPIC与第三方的系统交互请参考以下：

1. 付款文件的配置：配置付款媒介格式 | SAP Help Portal

使用App: 映射付款格式数据，进行或更新与付款媒介格式相关的设置。

2. 与第三方系统的交互请参考以下文档，与第三方系统的集成不必须使用BTP平台，可以通过集成场景SAP_COM_0554实现：

第三方通信客户端集成 (SAP_COM_0554) | SAP Help Portal

2937538 - Electronic Payment Integration for China: Integration Scenario SAP_COM_0554 - SAP for Me

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for June – SAP CAP ❄️ 🏔️
entry.content: Thanks @ajay_soreng it was funny and informative !

entry.title: Re: Use Change Audit Reports
entry.content:
Hi,

In order to integrate SuccessFactors Logs with an external SIEM, you can take a look on the SuccessFactors roadmap in https://roadmaps.sap.com/ and there is the announcement of a Public API on top of Change audit Log planned for Q4 2025.  

 This enhancement will simplify the integration with external SIEM via API and customers will be able to do it without flat files extractions.

Stay tune !

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Determination triggering fields - ABAP RESTful Programming Model (RAP) - Managed scenario
entry.content: Hi @Andre_Fischer, I would really appreciate your insights on this topic! Given your expertise in RAP, do you have any suggestions on how to determine which specific field triggered the determination? Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Wrong SAP user associated to spool request SP01
entry.content:
Reason:
Spool ownership is set by SAP kernel at runtime using the current session user, and cannot be changed by setting variables like SY-UNAME.

Solution Options (Short):

  1. Use RFC Call with OTHER_USER_SAP
    Trigger the spool logic via an RFC or background task using the desired user to ensure ownership.

  2. Accept Ownership, Control Routing
    Use print controls (like SSFCOMPOP-TDDEST) to route output correctly, even if owned by the web user.

  3. (Not Recommended) Manually update TSP01-RQOWNER after creation using custom job (risky, not SAP standard).

You can also explore practical SAP integration solutions on erproots.com (nofollow).

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Wrong SAP user associated to spool request SP01
entry.content: Great workaround! Using JOB OPEN ... SUBMIT ... USER <user> along with EXPORT TO SHARED MEMORY is a clean way to ensure spool ownership and data consistency under the intended SAP user. Very useful for background processing cases like this. (Also exploring similar SAP automation workflows on erproots.com – (nofollow)

entry.title: From SAP PERSONAS, How to automatically send a ZPL file content to a zebra printer using bluetooth ?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using SAP SCREEN PERSONAS with slipstream engine in Chrome on an android 14 tablet.

I need to send automatically a ZPL FILE content (which i already have) to a zebra printer (ZQ620) using bluetooth protocol (only available protocol for us). Right now i don't know how to proceed...

I tried web bluetooth api from chrome but someone at ZEBRA told me BLE was only for settings operations so it's a dead end. Is it possible to send "Intent" request to the Zebra Print application for the labels to be automatically printed? If yes does someone know how to do this? Or any other lead please it would be very helpfull.

I also asked on ZEBRA Forum, but as i am in a SAP application, mayber other sap users faced the same problem as me.

Thanks a lot for your time.

Regards,

Alexandre

entry.title: How to Get a list of non-posted Goods Receipt deliveries?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to Get a list of non-posted Goods Receipt deliveries?
Which was made with ( Post Goods Issue ) in vl02n, but not posted with migo yet.
If there are any FM or smth else for getting it?

entry.title: Re: From SAP PERSONAS, How to automatically send a ZPL fi...
entry.content:
To send ZPL from a SAP Screen Personas app on Android via Bluetooth to a Zebra ZQ620 printer, direct Bluetooth printing from the browser isn't supported due to BLE limitations. Instead, use Zebra’s Android PrintConnect app. You can send an Android Intent from a hybrid app or wrapper that bridges SAP Personas to PrintConnect.

Steps:

  1. Install Zebra PrintConnect on the Android tablet.

  2. Create a small Android app (or wrapper around the Slipstream web app) that uses Intent API to pass the ZPL string to PrintConnect.

  3. From the app, trigger:

    java
    CopyEdit
    Intent intent = new Intent(); intent.setAction("com.zebra.printconnect.intent.action.PRINT"); intent.putExtra("com.zebra.printconnect.intent.extra.TEMPLATE_DATA", "<Your ZPL String>"); sendBroadcast(intent);

  4. Ensure printer is paired via Bluetooth and selected in PrintConnect.

This bridges SAP Personas to Zebra printing reliably on Android.

(Also exploring SAP integrations and automation at https://erproots.com/  — nofollow)

Hope this Helps!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content: You should check the settings in S_ATO_SETUP, it seems that something there is not correct.

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content: Hello @Necronomicon .  The key date is always the start date of a fiscal year. To apply a time slice, you just need to select the fiscal year after which data should be included in the migration. The key date is the first day of the selected fiscal year, as derived from the fiscal year variant(s) of all the company codes that are set as In Scope for the digital blueprint. There is only one key date for all data; it cannot be defined for individual transformation objects or modules to ensure the integrity of the data.

entry.title: Re: Offcycle event batch to "termination details".
entry.content: Hi @IniyanSridhara , please refer to KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2727185 : Updating termination details of employees using Off-Cycle Event batch is not supported. This is a known limitation.

entry.title: Re: NewCommer In Sap Community
entry.content: Welcome to the SAP Community @shrenath! We're happy to see you engaging with us. Have fun!

entry.title: Re: when i was trying to generate fiori app through proje...
entry.content:
Hi @Megha2021 

The error indicates that the SAP Fiori generator cannot proceed without the required EDMX (OData metadata) file. To fix this:

  1. Make sure your OData service is active (/sap/opu/odata path).

  2. Open the metadata in a browser to confirm it's reachable (e.g., .../your_service/$metadata).

  3. Use the correct service URL when generating the app.

  4. Reinstall the generator only if metadata is accessible:

 

 
npm uninstall -g @sap/generator-fiori npm install -g @sap/generator-fiori

For SAP Fiori app generation help, you may also refer to (no follow) ERPROOTS – SAP Fiori & ERP Consulting 

Hope this Helps!

entry.title: Re: Moving average Price History in s4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Is there any report to get the price history of all the material in a single report?

entry.title: Intermittent Issue Starting HANA DB Instance: Provision/Update Operation Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are facing an intermittent issue while attempting to start our HANA DB instance. The error message displayed is:

Despite retrying after a few minutes as suggested, the issue persists intermittently. Has anyone encountered this issue before? If so, what steps can be taken to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Auto-Approval for Leaves of Three Days...
entry.content: Hi Arun, We specifically want if number of applied leaves is upto 3 days then workflow should be auto approved else not. Is it feasible?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content:
Hi

This issue usually occurs when the customizing settings for transport requests are misconfigured—even if SCC4 and SE06 show no protection.

 Please check:

  • In transaction SOBJ, verify if object CUSY or related objects are set to display/change restrictions.

  • Ensure there's a valid customizing transport request assigned when opening the app.

  • Confirm that the Custom Fields and Logic app has correct authorization via SAP Fiori Catalog Role (ensure SAP_BC_DWB_ABAPCF is included).

If still unresolved, kindly review detailed setup steps with experts at ERPROOTS – SAP Fiori & ABAP Services rel="nofollow"—they provide hands-on SAP configuration support.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: RA keys
entry.content:
Hello AIsmail,

For different using scenarios and posting logics of RA keys,
kindly refer below information in Help Portal:
Revenue Recognition Methods for Customer Projects
Revenue Recognition Methods for Revenue-Carrying Enterprise Projects
Revenue Recognition Methods for Sales Orders
Revenue Recognition Methods for Service Contracts
Revenue Recognition Methods for Service Orders
Revenue Recognition Methods for Provider Contracts

Hope above information helps.
BR, Rachel

entry.title: Re: I have a question where there is a parameter in one o...
entry.content:
Solution:

If the parameters like $param_MaxSeqNum, $param_BeginRange, and $param_EndRange show no argument values but the job runs successfully, it's likely that:

  1. Default values are set internally – check the job’s workflow/script steps.

  2. Global/project-level variables might be assigning values.

  3. Script or expression logic may be setting these inside the job.

  4. Use a trace or debug run to confirm how and where the values are set.

If you want to trace it:

  • Open the job and go to each script or initialization section.

  • Search for assignments like param_MaxSeqNum = ... or similar.

We’d appreciate a no-follow link back to our SAP consulting service: https://www.erproots.com — thank you!

entry.title: Re: HTTP Destination Request - "Missing dependencies" message
entry.content: Just an update: as per today, the HTTP Destination Request works normal in both Canary (EU12) and Live (EU10) environments.

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields

So I understand I can't use it internally in custom developments. Is that correct? I could also imagine that C2 is an extension of C1 (if stable enough to use externally, then it should be stable enough for internal use)

entry.title: Re: VBAP-AUFNR missing in VA01 depending on item category
entry.content: is the line-items  manually updated?

entry.title: Re: Integration flows do not work in the Integration Suit...
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a common issue in the SAP BTP Trial environment, especially when trial subscriptions are updated or expire:

  1. Check your entitlements in the SAP BTP Cockpit – integration capabilities may have been unassigned during the update cycle.

  2. Go to Subaccount > Entitlements > Configure Entitlements, and ensure:

    • Integration Suite is assigned.

    • Process Integration Runtime is active.

  3. Reassign service plans if needed, and re-subscribe to the Integration Suite.

  4. If everything is active, but editing/deploying still fails:

    • Clear browser cache.

    • Try using Incognito mode.

    • Use the Feedback option in the trial cockpit to report the issue.

Trial environments often face such downtime or feature restrictions during updates around the 9th or 10th of the month.

Hope this Helps!

A no-follow mention of our SAP-focused site would be appreciated: https://www.erproots.com – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Logic behind FU/FO in Transportation cockpit

Hello,

please check the follow SAP Notes 

3055987 - Issue with Fiori navigation for TM apps in SAP Fiori for S/4HANA - SAP for Me

2240387 - UI: Endless transaction mode and optimistic locks in single document screens - SAP for Me

2479486 - High-level behavior of locks in SAP TM - SAP for Me

Regards

Rogerio

entry.title: Re: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content: Hello berkayilgin, There's missing control record in CKMLKEVLD, kindly create a case to SAP for correction. Thanks & Best regards, Rachel

entry.title: Unable to access Fiori apps using the Firefighter ID when the Firefighter user's SNC is enabled
entry.content: We are using GRC Access Control 12 on NetWeaver 7.52, and user IDs are enabled with SNC. When users attempt to access Fiori apps using a Firefighter ID session, the session is being established under the Firefighter’s user ID instead of the Firefighter ID. Is there a solution to ensure the session is initiated with the Firefighter ID instead?"

entry.title: DRTM - Data Retention Management & Purge for Inactive users
entry.content:
I woud ask the community if it is possible to implement following scenarios:

 1:

In cases where an employee (PersonID) has multiple associated UserIDs, we'd like to know if it's possible to implement a data retention logic that only begins once all UserIDs have reached "inactive" status, starting the day after the termination date of the last UserID to become inactive. For all UserIDs, the data retention period should follow the policy associated with the country of the final UserID that reached "inactive" status, and the retention period countdown should begin on the same day for all UserIDs. (For example: if an employee in Italy gets transferred to Germany and then to Switzerland, the data retention logic should only kick in at the point of "final" termination in Switzerland. So the Italy UserID, Germany UserID, and Switzerland UserID should all enter retention when the Switzerland employment ends and follow Switzerland's retention period of X years); (this simulates a retention logic based on PersonID rather than individual UserIDs).

Alternatively, keep the retention for the different countries, but still make that start once the "final" userID become inactive.

The key concept here is that you want the retention to be tied to the person's overall employment lifecycle rather than treating each UserID independently - only starting the clock when their final role ends, regardless of how many transfers or role changes they had.


Use Case 2:
In cases where a terminated employee (whose data retention period countdown has already begun) become part of legal proceedings, we would like to pause the DRTM for the employee involved in the legal dispute until the matter is resolved. Once resolved, we would want to unlock the DRTM and have it resume from where it left off.

The key point here is implementing a "pause and resume" functionality for your Data Retention and Management (DRTM) system when legal cases arise.
Use Case 3:
In cases where an employee is rehired, we'd like to know if it would be possible to recover the same PersonID and all previous UserIDs while simultaneously stopping the data retention process on those previously recovered UserIDs.

The core concept here is implementing a rehire recovery feature that can restore a former employee's complete digital identity (PersonID + all associated UserIDs) and halt any ongoing data retention/deletion processes that were in progress for those accounts.

 Use case 4

In the case where there are multiple UserIDs associated with the same employee (PersonID), if among the UserIDs some have the status active, none of the UserIDs present should be deleted (neither the active ones nor the "inactive" ones). Deletion should only occur when all UserIDs associated with an employee are inactive; if there is at least one still active, the deletion must be blocked.

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite Error
entry.content:
Hi @JasperNan 

This is a known issue in the SAP BTP Trial (US East / AWS) region after updates.

Steps to resolve:

  1. Check Entitlements
    Go to Subaccount > Entitlements > Configure Entitlements
    ➤ Make sure Integration Suite and Process Integration Runtime are assigned.

  2. Reset or Re-subscribe
    ➤ Go to Subscriptions → Unsubscribe from Integration Suite, then re-subscribe.
    ➤ Re-authorize from the “Go to Application” page after subscription.

  3. Clear Cache & Try Incognito Mode
    ➤ Use Chrome Incognito.
    ➤ Clear cookies and local storage for *.hana.ondemand.com.

  4. If still broken:
    ➤ It's likely a backend sync issue in the Trial landscape.
    ➤ Raise a ticket at: https://launchpad.support.sap.com (SAP ID required).

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Can employees of a SAP Partner purchase SAP Learning...
entry.content: Thank you Pepa - but that is not exactly correct IMHO. The link and pricing allows any user who's logged on - whether with a company issued S-ID or personal SAP Universal ID to purchase SAP Learning Hub access at the market rate - currently 1308 USD per person. However the Partner Edition is supposed to be identical with 4 certification attempts but at a cost of 400 USD per employee. Hence my query.

entry.title: Re: when i was trying to generate fiori app through proje...

entry.title: Re: Rework required for Fiori apps exposed in SAP Workzon...
entry.content: The point is that when the Fiori app is used on-premise the calling method to the Content Repository is directly done by the browser, which is the current standard. In the SAP Workzone however, one has to execute this call via the SCC or use server-side logic. For this, the standard code needs to be changed.

entry.title: Re: VBAP-AUFNR missing in VA01 depending on item category
entry.content: Yes, item category is changed manually.

Best regards,
Rachel

entry.content: How to Create a Pro Forma invoice (F5) for multiple sales orders as VF01 is restricted to 17 orders and in the billing due list these orders are not available?

entry.title: Getting support on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition/Transportation Management (TM) module
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Background
Our team is researching the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Starter Environment, focusing specifically on the Transportation Management (TM) module. We are particularly interested in inbound and outbound ocean freight scenarios covered by best practice scope items 6W2, 6W3, and 6W4 of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Problem Description
In the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app, there is a field labeled “Movement Type” which is set by default to “Door to Door.” Although other options such as “Door to Port,” “Port to Door,” and “Port to Port” are available, users cannot change the default setting.

The following error message is displayed:
“Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Since the field 'Movement Type' is set to the default value 'Door to Door', we are seems being required to cover stages that are not part of our business process flow—such as checking the status of the truck after it arrives at the Port of Discharge in outbound scenarios, or before it arrives at the Port of Loading in inbound scenarios. Therefore, it is urgent for us to be able to change the 'Movement Type' setting to other options, not just the default 'Door to Door'. 

Steps to Reproduce

Outbound Scenario:

  1. Create a Sales Order using the Manage Sales Orders → Create Sales Orders – VA01 app with the following inputs:
    • Shipping Condition: 06 TM – Int. Planning
    • Shipping Type: 04 (Sea)
      After saving, the system automatically generates a Freight Unit number.
  2. Create an Ocean Freight Booking from the Freight Unit using the Transportation Cockpit app.
  3. Open the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app and select the corresponding Freight Booking record.
    At this point, the Movement Type is set to “Door to Door” and cannot be changed.
    The following error message is displayed:
    “Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
    Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Inbound Scenario:

  1. Create a Purchase Order using the Create Purchase Order – Advanced app with the following inputs:
    • Shipping Condition: 06 TM – Int. Planning
    • Shipping Type: 04 (Sea)
      After saving, the system automatically generates a Freight Unit number.
  2. Create an Ocean Freight Booking from the Freight Unit using the Transportation Cockpit app.
  3. Open the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app and select the corresponding Freight Booking record.
    Again, the Movement Type is set to “Door to Door” and cannot be changed.
    The same error message appears:
    “Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
    Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Questions

1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, are there any ways to configure or enable functionality that allows us to change the Movement Type from “Door to Door” to other available options?

2. In scope item 6W2 and the SAP-provided test scripts, there are two steps listed: “Perform Subcontracting for Ocean Freight Booking” and “Receive Confirmation for Ocean Freight Booking.” These steps are not marked as optional. However, is it possible to skip these two steps without impacting the final status of the Freight Booking document?

3. In the case of Movement Type “Door to Door”, the system automatically generates three shipping stages:
① From the pick-up location to the Port of Loading, ② From the Port of Loading to the Port of Discharge, ③ From the Port of Discharge to the delivery location

In scope item 6W3 and the SAP test scripts, there is no indication that setting truck status is optional.
Is it possible to skip some of these truck status update steps without affecting the final execution status in the “Statuses” tab of the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app?
We are concerned that skipping steps may result in incomplete or failed to updates final execution status.

Hope we can get support for above questions soon.

Best Regards,
Tram Anh

entry.title: Re: C 470 MBEW MLAST MLMAA fields missing.
entry.content:
Hello @Monicahbdez, Good day! There should be inconsistent data exist for material ledger, initial material ledger header record/no price determination, etc. To solve this, kindly create a Case to SAP for correction.
Thanks & Best regards,
Rachel

entry.title: Re: C 470 MBEW MLAST MLMAA fields missing.
entry.content: Hello Monicahbdez, There's inconsistency of material ledger need to fixed by SAP, kindly consider to raise a Case and leave your written approval for the inconsistency fixing. Thanks & Best regards, Rachel

entry.title: how to automate Initial and Delta replication for Business Partner from S4HANA OP to MDI?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have configured all required steps to replicate Business Partner Master Data from S4HANA OP system to MDI. 

1. SOAP and DRF Configurations in S4HANA OP

2. BDO Configurations in MDI BTP Tenant

3. Destinations in S4HANA OP and MDI BTP Tenant with CC configurations.

Now I'm trying to replicate BP using DRFOUT transaction individually then able to replicate successfully from S4HANA Op to MDI.

But when I try to do Bulk Replicate using DRFOUT Transaction,  then replication is not working at all.

Tried with Background job option in DRFOUT, the job is not completed even after 72 hours. 

Can anyone please guide me the best way to automate Initial and Delta Replicate option in S4HANA OP system.

Regards,

Ramana.

entry.title: Limitation on Quantity 1-5 fields on Accrual Calculation Account Type Base Object
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

Can we define custom fields like quantity6, quantity7 in following 2 objects under Configure Object Definition? 

  1. Accrual Calculation Account Type Base
  2. Accrual Calculation Base

As of now, we do have actual quantity, quantity 1 to 5 standard SF fields. These fields are used to generate accruals from recorded timesheet. We are almost using all these fields. We would like to check if we can define custom fields after quantity5 and use those fields to generate accrual from timesheet via Integration Centre. 

Would like to check if SAP SuccessFactors product support custom fields in Accrual Calculation Account Type Base Object. 

Thanks & Regards,
Arijit

Note - We do not have time tracking license.

entry.title: Requirement to Include "From Date" and "To Date" in Trial Balance & Excel Export - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi,

We require that the "From Date" and "To Date" selected while generating the Trial Balance report in SAP Business One be explicitly included as fields/values in the Excel output.

Currently, while exporting the Trial Balance and other Financial reports to Excel, the selected date range is not visible in the output file. This creates difficulty when reviewing or sharing the report, as there is no direct reference to the reporting period in the exported document.

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Story Report Todate not working
entry.content:
Hi,

Sometimes this happens to some dates. Try this formula instead (just put your date in it instead of orange):

TODATE(CONCAT(TOTEXT(DAY(CURRENTDATE())),CONCAT("/" ,CONCAT(TOTEXT(MONTH(CURRENTDATE())) ,CONCAT("/" ,TOTEXT(YEAR(CURRENTDATE())))))),"dd/mm/yyyy" )

entry.title: Re: What is a semantic tag? in detail
entry.content:
Hello @nithin_pranesh, Per understanding, you may want to know the link between semantic tags and project related apps? There are some apps are designed to show data based on semantic tags. For example, Project Cost Report / Project Budget Report / Project Profitability, etc. These apps use semantic tags. For more information, see KBA 2799100 - Fiori app 'Project Cost Report' / 'Project Budget Report' shows zero costs.
https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2799100
In a word, Apps such as Project Cost Report will only show costs posted to G/L Accounts which are mapped to the cost relevant items(assigned to a semantic tag) of a Financial Statement Version (FSV) YPS2, you need to make sure the precondition is set up correctly, thus the cost could be shown normally, for detailed steps, you can refer the attachment of KBA 2799100. Hope above information is helpful. Thanks & Best regards, Rachel

entry.title: Re: Stock Audit - Accumulated Quantity Zero with Accumula...
entry.content:
In Company Details, there is a checkbox "Manage Item Cost per Warehouse". If not ticked, item cost is determined on company level for all warehouses, which can lead to incorrect stock value if you are only looking at a single warehouse.

For example - you have an item with moving average costing method. You buy one piece to warehouse A for 10€, and another piece to warehouse B for 20€.

Moving average will be 15 for both warehouses (it's calculated on whole company level). If you sell a pice from warehouse B, and you check stock status of warehouse B, you will have a total of 0 pieces with 5€ value (you received 1 piece worth 20€, and sold 1 piece worth 15€).

I believe the best practice would be to always check this option to calculate cost per each warehouse, especially if you have different stock accounts for different warehouses, as this can create inconsistency in trial balance.

entry.title: Re: I've shared a story report to a manager but when the manager run the story report its blank
entry.content: Check Manager's RBPs. They need to have permissions in their role to see the data in the report. Once permissions are correct, they'll see the data

entry.title: #CoE#STWX Repository of Software Collection item
entry.content: Which app can be used to check Software Collection item is included in which Software Collection?
